parameters.subject: =New Comment Added on Task: {{$json.task_title}}
parameters.html:
=

Dear {{$json.recipient_firstname}} {{$json.recipient_lastname}},

A new comment has been added to the task {{$json.task_title}} for your review.

Comment Details

Task Title {{$json.task_title}}
Task Created On {{$json.task_created_at}}
Task End On {{$json.task_due_date}}
Milestone {{$json.milestone_title || 'N/A'}}
Project {{$json.project_title}}
Commented By {{$json.commented_by_firstname}} {{$json.commented_by_lastname}}
Comment “{{$json.comment_body}}”
Task URL View Task

Please review and respond if any action is required.

Regards,
Task Collaboration System

parameters.query:
SELECT
  c.id                         AS comment_id,
  c.body                       AS comment_body,
  c.created_at                 AS comment_created_at,
  c.commentor_id               AS commented_by_id,

  commenter.firstname          AS commented_by_firstname,
  commenter.lastname           AS commented_by_lastname,
  commenter.email              AS commented_by_email,

  t.id                         AS task_id,
  t.title                      AS task_title,
  t.parent_id                  AS parent_id,
  t.created_at                 AS task_created_at,
  t.target_date                AS task_due_date,

  owner.firstname              AS task_owner_firstname,
  owner.lastname               AS task_owner_lastname,
  owner.email                  AS task_owner_email,

  m.id                         AS milestone_id,
  m.title                      AS milestone_title,

  pm.id                        AS project_id,
  pm.title                     AS project_title,

  u.id                         AS mentioned_user_id,
  u.firstname                  AS mentioned_user_firstname,
  u.lastname                   AS mentioned_user_lastname,
  u.email                      AS mentioned_user_email

FROM comments c

JOIN task_managements t
  ON t.id = c.commentable_id
 AND c.commentable_type = 'TaskManagement'

LEFT JOIN milestones m
  ON m.id = t.milestone_id

LEFT JOIN project_managements pm
  ON pm.id = t.project_management_id

JOIN spree_users owner
  ON owner.id = t.responsible_person_id

LEFT JOIN spree_users commenter
  ON commenter.id = c.commentor_id

LEFT JOIN spree_users u
  ON c.body REGEXP CONCAT('\\@\\[.*\\]\\(', u.id, '\\)')

WHERE
  c.created_at >= UTC_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL 10 MINUTE
  AND t.parent_id IS NULL
  AND owner.organization_id IN (13, 14, 59, 84);

SELECT
  id,
  email
FROM spree_users
WHERE id IN ({{ $json.mentioned_user_ids.join(',') }});

parameters.query:
SELECT
  c.id                         AS comment_id,
  c.body                       AS comment_body,
  c.created_at                 AS comment_created_at,
  c.commentor_id               AS commented_by_id,

  commenter.firstname          AS commented_by_firstname,
  commenter.lastname           AS commented_by_lastname,
  commenter.email              AS commented_by_email,

  t.id                         AS task_id,
  t.title                      AS task_title,
  t.parent_id                  AS parent_id,
  t.created_at                 AS task_created_at,
  t.target_date                AS task_due_date,

  -- task owner
  owner.firstname              AS task_owner_firstname,
  owner.lastname               AS task_owner_lastname,
  owner.email                  AS task_owner_email,

  -- milestone
  m.id                         AS milestone_id,
  m.title                      AS milestone_title,

  -- project
  pm.id                        AS project_id,
  pm.title                     AS project_title,

  -- mentioned user
  u.id                         AS mentioned_user_id,
  u.firstname                  AS mentioned_user_firstname,
  u.lastname                   AS mentioned_user_lastname,
  u.email                      AS mentioned_user_email

FROM comments c

JOIN task_managements t
  ON t.id = c.commentable_id
 AND c.commentable_type = 'TaskManagement'

-- join milestone
LEFT JOIN milestones m
  ON m.id = t.milestone_id

-- join project directly from task (even if milestone is NULL)
LEFT JOIN project_managements pm
  ON pm.id = t.project_management_id

-- task owner
JOIN spree_users owner
  ON owner.id = t.responsible_person_id

-- commenter
LEFT JOIN spree_users commenter
  ON commenter.id = c.commentor_id

-- mentioned users
LEFT JOIN spree_users u
  ON c.body REGEXP CONCAT('\\@\\[.*\\]\\(', u.id, '\\)')

WHERE
  c.created_at >= UTC_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL 60 MINUTE
  AND t.parent_id IS NULL;

mySql.name: New FM UAT Task Management Database

parameters.query:
SELECT
  c.id                         AS comment_id,
  c.body                       AS comment_body,
  c.created_at                 AS comment_created_at,
  c.commentor_id               AS commented_by_id,

  MAX(commenter.firstname)      AS commented_by_firstname,
  MAX(commenter.lastname)       AS commented_by_lastname,
  MAX(commenter.email)          AS commented_by_email,

  t.id                         AS task_id,
  t.title                      AS task_title,
  t.parent_id                  AS parent_id,
  t.created_at                 AS task_created_at,
  t.target_date                AS task_due_date,

  MAX(owner.firstname)         AS task_owner_firstname,
  MAX(owner.lastname)          AS task_owner_lastname,
  MAX(owner.email)             AS task_owner_email,

  MAX(m.id)                    AS milestone_id,
  MAX(m.title)                 AS milestone_title,

  MAX(pm.id)                   AS project_id,
  MAX(pm.title)                AS project_title,

  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT u.id)                AS mentioned_user_ids,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT u.firstname)        AS mentioned_user_firstnames,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT u.lastname)         AS mentioned_user_lastnames,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT u.email)            AS mentioned_user_emails,

  GROUP_CONCAT(obs.id ORDER BY obs.id)             AS observer_ids,
  GROUP_CONCAT(obs.firstname ORDER BY obs.id)      AS observer_first_names,
  GROUP_CONCAT(obs.lastname ORDER BY obs.id)       AS observer_last_names,
  GROUP_CONCAT(obs.email ORDER BY obs.id)          AS observer_emails

FROM comments c

JOIN task_managements t
  ON t.id = c.commentable_id
 AND c.commentable_type = 'TaskManagement'

LEFT JOIN milestones m
  ON m.id = t.milestone_id

LEFT JOIN project_managements pm
  ON pm.id = t.project_management_id

JOIN spree_users owner
  ON owner.id = t.responsible_person_id

LEFT JOIN spree_users commenter
  ON commenter.id = c.commentor_id

LEFT JOIN spree_users u
  ON c.body REGEXP CONCAT('\\@\\[.*\\]\\(', u.id, '\\)')

LEFT JOIN task_users tu
  ON tu.task_id = t.id
  AND tu.user_type = 'observer'
  AND tu.active = 1

LEFT JOIN spree_users obs
  ON obs.id = tu.user_id

WHERE
  c.created_at >= UTC_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL 10 MINUTE
  AND t.parent_id IS NULL
  AND owner.organization_id IN (13, 14, 59, 84)

GROUP BY c.id;

SELECT
  c.id                         AS comment_id,
  c.body                       AS comment_body,
  c.created_at                 AS comment_created_at,
  c.commentor_id               AS commented_by_id,

  -- commenter info (aggregate in case of multiple matches, though usually 1)
  MAX(commenter.firstname)      AS commented_by_firstname,
  MAX(commenter.lastname)       AS commented_by_lastname,
  MAX(commenter.email)          AS commented_by_email,

  t.id                         AS task_id,
  t.title                      AS task_title,
  t.parent_id                  AS parent_id,
  t.created_at                 AS task_created_at,
  t.target_date                AS task_due_date,

  -- task owner
  MAX(owner.firstname)         AS task_owner_firstname,
  MAX(owner.lastname)          AS task_owner_lastname,
  MAX(owner.email)             AS task_owner_email,

  -- milestone
  MAX(m.id)                    AS milestone_id,
  MAX(m.title)                 AS milestone_title,

  -- project
  MAX(pm.id)                   AS project_id,
  MAX(pm.title)                AS project_title,

  -- mentioned users (aggregated)
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT u.id)                AS mentioned_user_ids,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT u.firstname)        AS mentioned_user_firstnames,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT u.lastname)         AS mentioned_user_lastnames,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT u.email)            AS mentioned_user_emails,

  -- observers (aggregated)
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT obs.id)             AS observer_ids,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT obs.firstname)      AS observer_first_names,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT obs.lastname)       AS observer_last_names,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT obs.email)          AS observer_emails

FROM comments c

JOIN task_managements t
  ON t.id = c.commentable_id
 AND c.commentable_type = 'TaskManagement'

-- milestone
LEFT JOIN milestones m
  ON m.id = t.milestone_id

-- project
LEFT JOIN project_managements pm
  ON pm.id = t.project_management_id

-- task owner
JOIN spree_users owner
  ON owner.id = t.responsible_person_id

-- commenter
LEFT JOIN spree_users commenter
  ON commenter.id = c.commentor_id

-- mentioned users
LEFT JOIN spree_users u
  ON c.body REGEXP CONCAT('\\@\\[.*\\]\\(', u.id, '\\)')

-- observers
LEFT JOIN task_users tu
  ON tu.task_id = t.id
  AND tu.user_type = 'observer'
  AND tu.active = 1

LEFT JOIN spree_users obs
  ON obs.id = tu.user_id

WHERE
  c.created_at >= UTC_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL 10 MINUTE
  AND t.parent_id IS NULL

GROUP BY c.id;
